<includeonly>{{#switch:{{#expr:({{JD lite|+9 hours}} + 0.5) mod 28}} |17 = [[Horn_(Chinese_constellation)|Horn (角宿)]] |18 = [[Neck_(Chinese_constellation)|Neck (亢宿)]] |19 = [[Root_(Chinese_constellation)|Root (氐宿)]] |20 = [[Room_(Chinese_constellation)|Room (房宿)]] |21 = [[Heart_(Chinese_constellation)|Heart (心宿)]] |22 = [[Tail_(Chinese_constellation)|Tail (尾宿)]] |23 = [[Winnowing_Basket_(constellation)|Winnowing Basket (箕宿)]] |24 = [[Dipper_(Chinese_constellation)|Dipper (斗宿)]] |25 = [[Ox_(Chinese_constellation)|Ox (牛宿)]] |26 = [[Girl (Chinese constellation)|Girl (女宿)]] |27 = [[Emptiness (Chinese constellation)|Emptiness (虚宿)]] |0 = [[Roof_(Chinese_constellation)|Roof (危宿)]] |1 = [[Encampment_(Chinese_constellation)|Encampment (室宿)]] |2 = [[Wall (Chinese constellation)|Wall (壁宿)]] |3 = [[Legs (Chinese constellation)|Legs (奎宿)]] |4 = [[Bond (Chinese constellation)|Bond (婁宿)]] |5 = [[Stomach (Chinese constellation)|Stomach (胃宿)]] |6 = [[Hairy Head|Hairy Head (昴宿)]] |7 = [[Net (Chinese constellation)|Net (畢宿)]] |8 = [[Turtle Beak|Turtle Beak (觜宿)]] |9 = [[Three Stars (Chinese constellation)|Three stars (参宿)]] |10 = [[Well (Chinese constellation)|Well (井宿)]] |11 = [[Ghost (Chinese constellation)|Ghost (鬼宿)]] |12 = [[Willow (Chinese constellation)|Willow (柳宿)]] |13 = [[Star (Chinese constellation)|Star (星宿)]] |14 = [[Exntended Net|Extended Net (張宿)]] |15 = [[Wings (Chinese constellation)|Wings (翼宿)]] |16 = [[Chariot (Chinese constellation)|Chariot (軫宿)]] }}</includeonly><noinclude> [[日本標準時]] (JST) におけるTwenty-Eight Mansions Todayを表示します。
;表示例 Today's Mansion is {{Twenty-Eight Mansions Today}}.
{{DEFAULTSORT:きようのにしゆうはつしゆく}} [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates|暦]] [[ja:Template:今日の二十八宿]][[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]]
[[Category:Ja import failed]] </noinclude>
